headline: Evercore ISI Downgrades Duke Energy (DUK) to In Line after Recent Share Rally
summary: Duke Energy Corporation (NYSE:DUK) is included among the 13 Best Defensive Dividend Stocks for 2025. On March 5, Evercore ISI downgraded Duke Energy Corporation (NYSE:DUK) to In Line from Outperform. The firm lowered its price target on the stock to $139 from $143. The firm said it still feels “constructive” about the company’s long-term growth […]

headline: Is Duke Energy (DUK) Pricing Reflect Its Recent Strong Returns And Dividend Outlook
summary: If you are wondering whether Duke Energy's current share price gives you fair value for your money, this article walks through the key numbers that matter for long term investors. The stock last closed at US$132.50, with reported total returns of 1.3% over 7 days, 8.4% over 30 days, 12.8% year to date, 17.5% over 1 year, 60.4% over 3 years and 76.0% over 5 years, which gives useful context before looking at what the shares might be worth. Recent news around Duke Energy has largely focused on...

headline: How The Investment Story For Duke Energy (DUK) Is Shifting As Analysts Reassess Upside
summary: Duke Energy’s updated narrative fair value has shifted from $135.71 to $137.41, while some Street price targets have moved both higher and lower, including changes to $139 from $130 and trims to $139 from $143. These mixed moves line up with a more balanced tone in recent research, where bulls point to growth projects and bears highlight the stock’s roughly 15% advance and valuation concerns. As you read on, you will see how to track these evolving targets and what they might mean for your...

headline: Is Duke Energy's US$6 Billion ATM Equity Plan Reshaping the Investment Case for DUK?
summary: Duke Energy Corporation recently established an at-the-market equity distribution program to issue up to US$6.00 billion of common stock, giving the company flexible tools to raise capital over time. This sizable equity program highlights Duke Energy’s intent to reinforce its balance sheet while funding renewable energy and grid infrastructure projects to meet rising demand. We’ll now examine how this large equity issuance plan could influence Duke Energy’s investment narrative, especially...
